title: Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya, Bilaspur
text_content: Latest Notifications & Events Admissions are open for various courses such as MBA, MCA, and BCA under the Centre for Distance and Online Education (CDOE). Close Green University Campus of GGV Courtesy meeting of the Vice-Chancellor with the Hon'ble President H'Vice President of India in XI Convocation XI Convocation Two-Day International Conference on “Rethinking Traditions: Shifting Perspec Two-Day International Conference on “Rethinking Traditions: Shifting Perspec Previous Next Latest News Admissions are open for various courses under the Centre for Distance and Online Education (CDOE). The website is currently under migration; some links may be temporarily unavailable. Kindly Contact to Concern Department. Accredited by NAAC A++ (Score-3.62) Graded Autonomy by University Grants Commission Category-1 University India Today Ranking 2025 Academic and Research Excellence Score 9th Times Higher Education World Interdisciplinary Science 401-500 Times Higher Education Asia University Ranking 2025 600+ QS Ranking QS World South Asia: 263 QS World Asia:801-850 Mental Health and Wellbeing (MHW) Platinum Band India 2024 India Academia Rankings Platinum Band India 2025 Smt. Droupadi Murmu Visitor Prof. Alok Kumar Chakrawal Vice Chancellor Welcome to GGV 0 Departments 0 + Students 0 + On site Course 0 Online Course 0 MoUs 0 + Social Connect Schemes More About Us Vice Chancellor's Message "I feel immense pleasure and a sense of responsibility on being appointed as the Vice-Chancellor of this temple of learning named after the great saint, Baba Guru Ghasidasji, who descended on the pious land of Chhattisgarh. Guru Ghasidas Central University is the Central University of Chhattisgarh which bears the important charge of providing job-oriented education, taking care of the educational aspirations, dissemination of quality education and enlightenment of the people of local society and remote areas....
